records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Naielle didn't come to class again today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Naielle didn't come to class again today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Naielle didn't come to class again today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all that she went through, perhaps she needs some rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all that she went through, perhaps she needs some rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all that she went through, perhaps she needs some rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it was a simulation, the mental drain would be burdensome.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it was a simulation, the mental drain would be burdensome.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it was a simulation, the mental drain would be burdensome.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I came to tell her some big news about the Academy...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I came to tell her some big news about the Academy...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I came to tell her some big news about the Academy...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Do you feel lonely?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Do you feel lonely?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Do you feel lonely?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no way! The classroom is super quiet, and I love it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no way! The classroom is super quiet, and I love it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no way! The classroom is super quiet, and I love it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not worry. Naielle will recover and return soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not worry. Naielle will recover and return soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not worry. Naielle will recover and return soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I suggest we go visit her at the hospital after school.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I suggest we go visit her at the hospital after school.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I suggest we go visit her at the hospital after school.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She might not show it, but I am certain it will brighten her day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She might not show it, but I am certain it will brighten her day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She might not show it, but I am certain it will brighten her day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-do you really think so...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-do you really think so...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-do you really think so...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait! If you say it like that, it makes me look desperate...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait! If you say it like that, it makes me look desperate...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait! If you say it like that, it makes me look desperate...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? WHOA! Since when were you there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? WHOA! Since when were you there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? WHOA! Since when were you there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: From when you said something about big news!
records.m_Talk_DEU: From when you said something about big news!
records.m_Talk_FRA: From when you said something about big news!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then you heard everything?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then you heard everything?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then you heard everything?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. You still think I need to rest? I regained my strength a long time ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. You still think I need to rest? I regained my strength a long time ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. You still think I need to rest? I regained my strength a long time ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see, if I had fallen there, I would've lost my title as the best elite!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see, if I had fallen there, I would've lost my title as the best elite!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see, if I had fallen there, I would've lost my title as the best elite!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. I am relieved that you returned safely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. I am relieved that you returned safely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. I am relieved that you returned safely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what's the big news?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what's the big news?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what's the big news?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And don't you dare run away mid-sentence again!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And don't you dare run away mid-sentence again!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And don't you dare run away mid-sentence again!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I won't! Will you let me go?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I won't! Will you let me go?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I won't! Will you let me go?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A new teacher is coming to the Academy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A new teacher is coming to the Academy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A new teacher is coming to the Academy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you'll be surprised to hear who it is. Have any guesses?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you'll be surprised to hear who it is. Have any guesses?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you'll be surprised to hear who it is. Have any guesses?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-ah hah hah... a magician needs to know how to elicit interest from a crowd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-ah hah hah... a magician needs to know how to elicit interest from a crowd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-ah hah hah... a magician needs to know how to elicit interest from a crowd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, our new teacher is...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, our new teacher is...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, our new teacher is...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, what are y'all doin' still chattin'? Class has already started, so get back in your seats.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, what are y'all doin' still chattin'? Class has already started, so get back in your seats.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, what are y'all doin' still chattin'? Class has already started, so get back in your seats.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on! Who's cutting us off this time?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on! Who's cutting us off this time?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on! Who's cutting us off this time?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! Am I botherin' you again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! Am I botherin' you again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! Am I botherin' you again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on... That voice...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on... That voice...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on... That voice...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Mi Rinae, your teacher for this class starting today. Nice to meet y'all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Mi Rinae, your teacher for this class starting today. Nice to meet y'all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Mi Rinae, your teacher for this class starting today. Nice to meet y'all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, then... we should do an orientation class, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, then... we should do an orientation class, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, then... we should do an orientation class, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Eh! I'm not a big fan of formalities like that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Eh! I'm not a big fan of formalities like that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Eh! I'm not a big fan of formalities like that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, gather 'round the track! What you all oughta be doin' at your age is kickin' balls and havin' a good time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, gather 'round the track! What you all oughta be doin' at your age is kickin' balls and havin' a good time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, gather 'round the track! What you all oughta be doin' at your age is kickin' balls and havin' a good time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you again?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you again?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you again?!
